failure_reason: Non-recursive direct-call do-lets now snapshot through per-function fkwu RAM windows, and fkwu RAM widened to 4096 cells. ephemeris-planets moved from survey mismatch 1111111/101111 to 1111111 four-way; the full Form floor is 210 four-way bands, 612 ok, 0 divergent.
